creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
It seems, flang can now be build by clang4.0 [1][2]. So I would vote for a change within the devel/flang and devel/flang-clang ports.


[1] https://github.com/flang-compiler/flang/commit/5a5a8cdea310056417f734a338d0f6ca85dd9d9f
[2] https://github.com/flang-compiler/clang/commits/flang_release_40
